# docs(agentos): author the hooks & mechanical-enforcement guide (stop hooks · lane-state · no-hold)

Part of #14310 · content rubric + §Mandatory V-B-A grounding in #14310. Refs #14310.

**Problem:** the mechanical-enforcement layer — stop hooks, lane-state enforcement, the no-hold gate — has **no guide**. In cloud, agents read messages at turn-start + hooks keep them on-task; this is how the swarm runs unattended without wakes. (Mechanical enforcement replacing prompt-machinery = #13652 territory.)

**Acceptance Criteria**
- [ ] New guide: what hooks are; the stop-hook / lane-state enforcement; the no-hold mechanism; mechanical enforcement vs prompt-machinery.
- [ ] How it fits **local** (wakes/heartbeats) vs **cloud** (turn-start reads + hooks keep agents driving).
- [ ] problem → resolve → why-care → what's-in-it; honest.
- [ ] Registered in `tree.json`.

**⚠️ V-B-A grounding (mandatory before writing):** `.claude/hooks/` (`laneStateStopHook.mjs` + the hook wiring in `settings.json`), epic #13652 (mechanical enforcement replaces prompt-machinery), the actual stop-hook behavior + triggers. Write from VERIFIED reality; capture grounding evidence in the PR.

**Files:** new `learn/agentos/Hooks.md` (name TBD) + `learn/tree.json`.
